title: Japanese Brie Okonomiyaki
description: A dairy-free twist on the classic Japanese dish featuring brie cheese, crunchy tempura, and savory sauce.

ingredients.name: Brie cheese substitute (dairy-free brie or tofu brie)

instructions: In a large bowl, combine the shredded cabbage, sliced shiitake mushrooms, grated carrots, and okonomiyaki mix.
Add the dairy-free brie or tofu brie, soy sauce, rice vinegar, and sugar to the bowl and mix well.
Heat a large non-stick skillet or okonomiyaki pan over medium-high heat.
Add the tempura bits to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until they start to brown.
Add the cabbage mixture to the skillet and press down with a spatula to form a round shape.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the bottom is golden brown.
Use a spatula to carefully flip the okonomiyaki and cook for another 2-3 minutes, or until the other side is golden brown.
Transfer the okonomiyaki to a plate and garnish with sesame seeds and thinly sliced scallions.
Drizzle with additional soy sauce and rice vinegar if desired.
